steps.title: Identify the fundamental opposition
steps.content: The notes establish that intaglio and relief are opposites: ink is applied to carved grooves in intaglio but to raised, uncarved portions in relief.

steps.title: Find the choice that frames this opposition
steps.content:
Choice A states relief is “intaglio's reverse” and explains the opposite ink applications.

The other three either identify which technique was used without contrasting (B), describe a property both share (C), or explicitly stress similarity (D).

That matches choice A — A is correct.
